mapper.select:
SELECT item_cd, item_nm, item_grp, spec, unit_cd, unit_price, use_yn, remark, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at FROM tb_item
ORDER BY item_grp, item_cd
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_item (item_cd, item_nm, item_grp, spec, unit_cd, unit_price, use_yn, remark, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at) VALUES (#{item_cd}, #{item_nm}, #{item_grp}, #{spec}, #{unit_cd}, #{unit_price}, #{use_yn}, #{remark}, #{user_id}, NOW(), #{user_id}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_item SET item_nm = #{item_nm}, item_grp = #{item_grp}, spec = #{spec}, unit_cd = #{unit_cd}, unit_price = #{unit_price}, use_yn = #{use_yn}, remark = #{remark}, updated_by = #{user_id}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE item_cd = #{item_cd}
